name: sacked and deserted monastary
description: I'm in a sacked and deserted monastary
hints: There is treasure here but deadly snakes guard it. You need protection.
The mongoose from the meadow kills snakes. Bring it with you.
Have the mongoose in your inventory when entering - it will kill the mamba snakes automatically.
Bring the mongoose (from room 8 meadow). It kills the snakes. Then GET DUBLEONS (treasure). Go WEST to return to the field.
notes: Deserted monastery with dubleons treasure guarded by deadly mamba snakes. The mongoose (from meadow, room 8) is essential to survive - it kills the snakes. WEST returns to the barren field (room 23).
